zh.lifeSummary: 當William Carter於1574年2月20日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 薩默塞特 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 莫塔福時，他的父親John Ammon Carter25歲，母親Joane Woodman24歲。他於1599年10月15日與Martha Rainan在英國米德萊可斯特普尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1605年在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年31歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Carter于1574年2月20日出生在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 薩默塞特 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 莫塔福时，他的父亲John Ammon Carter25岁，母亲Joane Woodman24岁。他于1599年10月15日与Martha Rainan在英国米德萊可斯特普尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1605年在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特享年31岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Carter was born on 20 February 1574, in London St Mary Somerset with St Mary Mounthaw, Middlesex, England, his father, John Ammon Carter, was 25 and his mother, Joane Woodman, was 24. He married Martha Rainan on 15 October 1599, in Stepney, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1605, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

Il a épousé Martha Rainan le 15 octobre 1599, à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1605, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: William Carter(이)가 1574년 2월 20일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 서머세트 위스 스트 메리 모우스아w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ammon Carter(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Woodman(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1599년 10월 15일 영국 미들레세스 스테p니에서 Martha Rainan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1605년 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Martha Rainan em 15 de outubro de 1599, em Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.St Mary Somerset, London, England: лондон ст мэри сомирсет вит ст мэри маунтав, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Carter родился 20 февраля 1574 г. в местности лондон ст мэри сомирсет вит ст мэри маунтав, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Ammon Carter было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Woodman, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Rainan 15 октября 1599 г. в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1605 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Martha Rainan el 15 de octubre de 1599, en Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1605, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
